"cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-789", "name": "Memory Allocation with Excessive Size Value"}], "description": "`DecimalConverter.ReadDecimal` makes a stackalloc using what might be an attacker-supplied value. If an attacker declares a decimal column with some unreasonable width, this could lead to a stack overflow. In a service environment, this would potentially take down a service.\n\nThis affects applications using ParquetSharp to read untrusted Parquet files in a network service.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00273, "percentile": 0.18796}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-rrjr-v56m-ww88", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-24T16:39:55Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rrjr-v56m-ww88", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-rrjr-v56m-ww88"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42241"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-07T20:16:44Z", "published_at": "2026-04-24T16:39:55Z", "references": ["https://github.com/G-Research/ParquetSharp/security/advisories/GHSA-rrjr-v56m-ww88", "https://github.com/G-Research/ParquetSharp/releases/tag/23.0.0.1", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42241", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rrjr-v56m-ww88"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/G-Research/ParquetSharp/security-advisories/GHSA-rrjr-v56m-ww88", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/G-Research/ParquetSharp", "summary": "ParquetSharp: Possible Stack Overflow When Reading a ParquetFile with Large Decimal Type Width", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-11T13:29:39Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-rrjr-v56m-ww88", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "23.0.0.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "ParquetSharp"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 18.1.0, < 23.0.0.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
